parameters.name: search_station
parameters.description: Search for a Swiss train station by name (SBB/CFF/FFS). Returns station names and IDs. Parameter: query (station name to search for, e.g. 'Zürich HB')

parameters.name: get_departures
parameters.description: Get upcoming departures from a Swiss train station (SBB). Accepts station name or ID. Parameters: station (e.g. 'Zürich HB'), results (optional, number of entries, default 10)

parameters.name: get_arrivals
parameters.description: Get upcoming arrivals at a Swiss train station (SBB). Accepts station name or ID. Parameters: station (e.g. 'Bern'), results (optional, number of entries, default 10)

parameters.name: search_journey
parameters.description: Search for Swiss train connections between two stations (SBB). Accepts station names or IDs. Parameters: from (origin, e.g. 'Zürich HB'), to (destination, e.g. 'Bern'), departure (optional, ISO 8601 datetime), results (optional, number of connections, default 3)
